title: Submission: Static-Unified Flash-Nitro (SUFN) 10-minute Baseline
author: zeal175

data.description: Uses native scaled dot-product attention with is_causal=True to leverage Flash Attention 2 for efficient causal attention
Robust distributed token loader with rounding logic to handle phase transitions and avoid shape errors across ranks

novel_contributions: Perfectly static unified 1024-sequence graph to avoid recompilation stalls
Native is_causal=True Flash Attention via SDPA for efficient causal attention
Rank-sharded distributed token loading fix for stable multi-GPU training
Baseline optimized for sub-10-minute wallclock compliance
